sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45451" key="eu)/futos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔφῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φυτόν</etym>) <sense id="n45451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-planted</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:228" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.228</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
